user.title: Create a Hydronic Climate plant
user.description: New plants begin in shadow mode and do not control equipment.

zone.title: Add the first comfort zone
zone.description: Select the temperature sensor used for initial shadow demand.

circuit.title: Add the first hydraulic circuit
circuit.description: Equipment is observed only in this release. No service calls are made.

review.title: Review shadow topology
review.description: Zone {zone} will request circuit {circuit}. Hydronic Climate remains in shadow mode.

error.invalid_topology: The initial topology is not valid.

user.title: Add a valve actuator
user.description: Attach a shadow-mode valve to one or more existing circuits.

reconfigure.title: Update valve actuator
reconfigure.description: Change the valve binding, opening time, or attached circuits.

error.invalid_actuator: The actuator cannot be attached to this topology.

abort.no_circuits: Add a hydraulic circuit before adding an actuator.
